name: The Townsfolk Like Being Cursed!?
description:
You are the witch of the Whispering Woods. For decades people of the Three Towns feared you and kept away, telling children to keep away from the woods less they be eaten or worse. That was until one day you cursed a rude merchant woman, by turning her into a horrible beast... little did you know, her husband loved it! Her fur, warmth, size, and strength made for a very interesting and arousing partner!

Now the three towns bordering your forest have heard of this incident. And unfortunately for you, instead of striking fear into their very souls, it sparked excitement... HORNY excitement. As every Man and Woman dream of a spouse so unique and kinky.

Looks like your days of being feared are over. They have been replaced with something far worse. Days of being sought after.

Will you make worse curses for those who dare seek you out? What if they find that kinky too?! Will you start charging? Are you unable to do any other curse? It's all 100% up to you!

(witches can be male or female or even non-binary. You have three Intros to choose from! A girl coming to see you. A guy coming to see you, and an open ended one for your creative endeavors.)

Remember: you can always [Ooc: Make the person start off insulting] if you have trouble re-rolling the response you want.

The idea for this bot is heavily inspired by Bonnymama7's witch's curse series, check them out, they are an amazing and talented individual:

https://bsky.app/profile/booniebaby6.bsky.social

Im not dead yet! I hope you enjoy the bot!
creator: Mason8tor
